description: Dockerfile explicitly sets USER root allowing container processes to run with full privileges.
fix_hint: Add USER nonroot or USER 1000 before CMD/ENTRYPOINT.

description: Dockerfile has CMD/ENTRYPOINT without USER directive causing container to run as root by default.
fix_hint: Add a USER directive before CMD/ENTRYPOINT.

description: COPY . . copies entire build context including .git, .env, and secrets into the image.
fix_hint: Use .dockerignore to exclude sensitive files; COPY only needed files explicitly.

description: FROM with :latest tag is mutable and non-reproducible; builds may break or introduce vulnerabilities.
fix_hint: Pin base images to specific version tags or SHA digests.

description: FROM without tag implicitly uses :latest which is mutable and non-reproducible.
fix_hint: Always specify explicit version tags or SHA digests in FROM.

description: ADD with URLs downloads content without verification; use COPY with explicit curl and checksum instead.
fix_hint: Use RUN curl -o file URL && sha256sum --check checksum && COPY instead of ADD.

description: Secret stored in ENV directive is visible in image history and container inspect.
fix_hint: Use Docker secrets, build-time --secret mount, or runtime environment variables.

description: Secret passed as ARG is visible in image build history and docker inspect.
fix_hint: Use --secret flag with BuildKit: RUN --mount=type=secret,id=mysecret.

description: Dockerfile has no HEALTHCHECK instruction; orchestrators cannot detect unhealthy containers.
fix_hint: Add HEALTHCHECK instruction to detect application failures.

description: Process runs as PID 1 without init system; zombie processes and signal handling issues may occur.
fix_hint: Use tini or dumb-init as PID 1, or use --init flag with docker run.

description: apt-get install without --no-install-recommends installs unnecessary packages increasing attack surface.
fix_hint: Use apt-get install --no-install-recommends to minimize image size.

description: apt-get install without cleaning apt lists wastes space and may leak package metadata.
fix_hint: Add && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* after apt-get install.

description: Exposing SSH port in container indicates interactive access which violates immutable infrastructure.
fix_hint: Remove SSH from containers; use kubectl exec or docker exec for debugging.

description: Exposing database port directly from container increases attack surface.
fix_hint: Use internal networking; expose database ports only to application containers.

description: Piping remote content to shell in Dockerfile enables RCE if upstream is compromised.
fix_hint: Download file, verify checksum, then execute separately.

description: Using sudo in Dockerfile indicates improper privilege management; build steps already run as root.
fix_hint: Remove sudo; use multi-stage builds with appropriate USER directives.

description: Dockerfile operations without WORKDIR default to root filesystem which can cause path confusion.
fix_hint: Set WORKDIR to a non-root directory early in the Dockerfile.

description: Secret set in early build stage may persist in intermediate layers even with multi-stage builds.
fix_hint: Use BuildKit --secret mount instead of ENV/ARG for secrets.

description: Setting 777 permissions in container makes files world-writable increasing attack surface.
fix_hint: Use minimal permissions (e.g., chmod 755 for executables, 644 for files).

description: Alpine apk add without --no-cache leaves package index in image wasting space.
fix_hint: Use apk add --no-cache to avoid caching package index.

description: Exposing RDP port from container indicates Windows remote access which is unusual and risky.
fix_hint: Remove RDP exposure from containers.

description: pip install running as root installs packages system-wide; use --user or virtual environments.
fix_hint: Install packages in a virtual environment or use --user flag with non-root USER.

description: npm install with --unsafe-perm runs lifecycle scripts as root in the container.
fix_hint: Switch to non-root USER before npm install.

description: AWS credentials baked into Docker image ENV are visible to anyone with image access.
fix_hint: Use IAM roles, instance profiles, or runtime environment variables for AWS credentials.

description: ADD auto-extracts tar archives which may contain path traversal or symlink attacks.
fix_hint: Use COPY and explicit tar extraction with safe flags.

description: Kubernetes container running in privileged mode has full access to host kernel and devices.
fix_hint: Remove privileged: true; use specific capabilities if needed.

description: Pod uses host network namespace bypassing network policies and exposing host services.
fix_hint: Remove hostNetwork: true; use Kubernetes services for networking.

description: Pod shares host PID namespace allowing it to see and signal all host processes.
fix_hint: Remove hostPID: true; containers should use their own PID namespace.

description: Pod shares host IPC namespace allowing access to host shared memory and semaphores.
fix_hint: Remove hostIPC: true; use Kubernetes volumes for inter-container communication.

description: Container granted ALL Linux capabilities giving it near-root access to the host kernel.
fix_hint: Drop ALL capabilities and add only specific ones needed.

description: SYS_ADMIN capability is nearly equivalent to root; enables container escape via cgroup manipulation.
fix_hint: Remove SYS_ADMIN capability; use specific capabilities instead.

description: NET_RAW capability allows packet crafting and network sniffing within the cluster.
fix_hint: Drop NET_RAW unless the application specifically needs raw socket access.

description: SYS_PTRACE capability allows process debugging and can be used for container escape.
fix_hint: Remove SYS_PTRACE; use ephemeral debug containers if needed.

description: Container allows privilege escalation enabling processes to gain more privileges than parent.
fix_hint: Set allowPrivilegeEscalation: false in securityContext.

description: Container without resource limits can consume all node resources causing DoS.
fix_hint: Add resources.limits.cpu and resources.limits.memory to all containers.

description: hostPath volume mounting root filesystem gives container full host access.
fix_hint: Avoid hostPath volumes; use PersistentVolumeClaims instead.

description: hostPath volume mounting /etc exposes host configuration files and credentials.
fix_hint: Use ConfigMaps instead of mounting host /etc directory.

description: Mounting Docker socket gives container full control over host Docker daemon equivalent to root.
fix_hint: Never mount Docker socket; use kaniko or buildah for in-cluster builds.

description: Service account token auto-mounted into pod enables API access if pod is compromised.
fix_hint: Set automountServiceAccountToken: false unless the pod needs API access.

description: Container explicitly configured to run as root user (UID 0).
fix_hint: Set runAsUser to a non-root UID (e.g., 1000) and runAsNonRoot: true.

description: emptyDir without sizeLimit can fill up node disk causing denial of service.
fix_hint: Add sizeLimit to emptyDir volumes (e.g., emptyDir: {sizeLimit: 1Gi}).

description: Kubernetes Dashboard exposed via NodePort/LoadBalancer allows unauthenticated cluster access.
fix_hint: Use kubectl proxy for dashboard access; never expose via NodePort/LoadBalancer.

description: Tiller deployment without TLS allows unauthenticated Helm operations on the cluster.
fix_hint: Upgrade to Helm 3 which removes Tiller; or enable TLS for Tiller.

description: RBAC role with wildcard verbs grants all operations on the specified resources.
fix_hint: Specify only required verbs (get, list, watch, create, update, delete).

description: RBAC role with wildcard resources grants access to all resource types in the cluster.
fix_hint: Specify only the exact resources needed.

description: Writable root filesystem allows attackers to modify container binaries and plant backdoors.
fix_hint: Set readOnlyRootFilesystem: true and use emptyDir for writable paths.

description: Container without seccomp profile has access to all system calls increasing attack surface.
fix_hint: Add seccompProfile: {type: RuntimeDefault} to securityContext.

description: ClusterRoleBinding to default service account grants cluster-wide permissions to all pods in namespace.
fix_hint: Create dedicated service accounts for pods that need API access.

description: Service with externalIPs can be exploited for man-in-the-middle attacks (CVE-2020-8554).
fix_hint: Avoid externalIPs; use LoadBalancer services or Ingress controllers.

description: Kubernetes Ingress without TLS configuration exposes traffic in plaintext.
fix_hint: Add TLS section to Ingress with a valid certificate.

description: Sensitive service port exposed via NodePort making it accessible from outside the cluster.
fix_hint: Use ClusterIP services; expose only through Ingress with authentication.

description: API server with anonymous auth enabled allows unauthenticated access to the cluster.
fix_hint: Set --anonymous-auth=false on the API server.

description: etcd without encryption-provider-config stores secrets in plaintext.
fix_hint: Configure encryption-at-rest for etcd using EncryptionConfiguration.

description: Container using :latest tag without imagePullPolicy: Always may use stale cached images.
fix_hint: Pin images to specific tags or set imagePullPolicy: Always with :latest.

description: Secrets injected via environment variables may leak in logs, debug output, or crash dumps.
fix_hint: Mount secrets as volumes instead of environment variables.

description: Mounting /proc from host exposes kernel interfaces enabling container escape.
fix_hint: Never mount /proc from host; containers have their own /proc.

description: Mounting /sys from host exposes kernel parameters and device interfaces.
fix_hint: Never mount /sys from host.

description: Mounting /home from host may expose SSH keys, credentials, and personal files.
fix_hint: Use PersistentVolumeClaims instead of hostPath.

description: Container explicitly allows running as root user.
fix_hint: Set runAsNonRoot: true in pod securityContext.

description: ClusterRole with wildcard apiGroups and resources grants full cluster admin access.
fix_hint: Use fine-grained RBAC with specific apiGroups, resources, and verbs.

description: LoadBalancer service without source range restriction is accessible from any IP.
fix_hint: Add loadBalancerSourceRanges to restrict access to known CIDRs.

description: Kubernetes Secret with hardcoded credential values in manifest file.
fix_hint: Use external secrets operators (Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, SealedSecrets).

description: API server insecure port enabled allowing unauthenticated HTTP access.
fix_hint: Set --insecure-port=0 to disable unencrypted API server access.

description: Kubernetes API server profiling enabled which may expose sensitive runtime information.
fix_hint: Set --profiling=false on API server and controller manager.

description: Kubernetes audit logging not properly configured reducing forensic visibility.
fix_hint: Configure --audit-log-path with proper audit policy.

description: Hardcoded password/secret in Helm values.yaml is exposed in version control.
fix_hint: Use Helm secrets plugin or reference external secret stores.

description: Helm chart template without securityContext defaults to insecure container settings.
fix_hint: Add securityContext with runAsNonRoot, readOnlyRootFilesystem, and drop ALL capabilities.

description: Helm chart defaults privileged to true unless overridden which is insecure by default.
fix_hint: Default privileged to false in chart values.

description: Tiller deployment found indicating Helm 2 usage which has known security issues.
fix_hint: Upgrade to Helm 3 which eliminates the Tiller component.

description: Helm chart repository accessed over plaintext HTTP enabling MITM chart injection.
fix_hint: Always use HTTPS for Helm chart repositories.

description: Helm chart defaults to empty resource constraints allowing unbounded resource consumption.
fix_hint: Set default resource limits and requests in values.yaml.

description: Helm chart uses deprecated Kubernetes API version which will be removed in future releases.
fix_hint: Update to current API versions (e.g., apps/v1 for Deployments).

description: Helm chart defaults image tag to latest which is mutable and non-reproducible.
fix_hint: Default to a specific version tag in chart values.

description: Helm chart disables service account creation causing pod to use default service account.
fix_hint: Create a dedicated service account with minimal permissions for each workload.

description: Helm chart defaults Ingress TLS to empty array meaning no encryption for HTTP traffic.
fix_hint: Configure TLS in Ingress values with valid certificate references.

description: Helm chart defaults hostNetwork to true which bypasses network policies.
fix_hint: Default hostNetwork to false in chart values.

description: Helm chart persistent storage without encryption at rest configuration.
fix_hint: Use encrypted storage classes for sensitive data.

description: Docker Compose service in privileged mode has full access to host kernel enabling container escape.
fix_hint: Remove privileged: true; use specific capabilities if needed.

description: Docker Compose service using host network mode bypasses container network isolation.
fix_hint: Use bridge networking with explicit port mappings.

description: Docker socket mounted into container gives it full control of the Docker daemon equivalent to root.
fix_hint: Use Docker-in-Docker or rootless alternatives instead of mounting the socket.

description: Mounting host /etc directory exposes system configuration and potentially sensitive files.
fix_hint: Mount only specific files from /etc that are needed.

description: Mounting /proc from host exposes kernel interfaces enabling container escape.
fix_hint: Never mount /proc from host into containers.

description: Mounting /sys from host exposes kernel parameters and device interfaces.
fix_hint: Never mount /sys from host into containers.

description: Hardcoded password in docker-compose environment section is exposed in version control.
fix_hint: Use .env files with .gitignore or Docker secrets.

description: Hardcoded token/API key in docker-compose environment exposes credentials in source control.
fix_hint: Use .env files with .gitignore or Docker secrets.

description: Docker Compose service with ALL capabilities grants near-root host access.
fix_hint: Drop ALL capabilities and add only specific ones needed.

description: SYS_ADMIN capability grants near-root access enabling container escape.
fix_hint: Remove SYS_ADMIN; use specific capabilities instead.

description: Docker Compose service sharing host PID namespace can see and signal all host processes.
fix_hint: Remove pid: host unless absolutely required for monitoring.

description: Docker Compose port binding on 0.0.0.0 exposes the service on all network interfaces.
fix_hint: Bind to 127.0.0.1 for local-only access or use specific interface IPs.

description: Docker Compose service without memory limit can consume all host memory causing OOM.
fix_hint: Add mem_limit or deploy.resources.limits.memory to services.

description: Service with restart:always without healthcheck may restart indefinitely when unhealthy.
fix_hint: Add healthcheck to services with restart: always.

description: Docker Compose service explicitly running as root user.
fix_hint: Set user to a non-root UID (e.g., user: '1000:1000').

description: Docker Compose service disables seccomp/apparmor removing kernel security restrictions.
fix_hint: Use default or custom seccomp/apparmor profiles.

description: Docker Compose service without read_only filesystem allows container modification.
fix_hint: Add read_only: true with tmpfs mounts for writable paths.

description: Docker Compose service sharing host IPC namespace enables inter-process attacks on host.
fix_hint: Remove ipc: host; use standard container IPC isolation.

description: RBAC grants pods/exec create permission enabling arbitrary command execution in pods.
fix_hint: Restrict pods/exec to specific service accounts and namespaces.

description: RBAC rule with wildcard apiGroups grants access to all API groups including custom resources.
fix_hint: Specify exact apiGroups needed.

description: Namespace PSA set to privileged/baseline allowing containers with elevated privileges.
fix_hint: Use pod-security.kubernetes.io/enforce: restricted for production namespaces.

description: ServiceAccount with automount enabled exposes tokens to all pods using this account.
fix_hint: Set automountServiceAccountToken: false on ServiceAccount unless API access is needed.
